title: v0.dev Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and techniques for using v0.dev effectively.

commands.description: Sets the randomness of the AI's responses.
commands.scenario: When building a code review bot that needs deterministic output.

commands.description: Selects the GPT-4o model and enables streaming responses.
commands.scenario: When integrating real-time code suggestions into an IDE.

commands.command: Think step by step. Then verify your answer.
commands.description: Encourages the model to provide more logical and verified responses.
Limits the response length to control verbosity and cost.
Sets the context size for the model to remember previous interactions.
commands.scenario: When working on large projects requiring context retention.

commands.description: Formats the response in JSON for easier parsing and integration.
commands.scenario: When integrating with other systems that require structured data.

commands.description: Sets a timeout for API requests to prevent hanging.
commands.scenario: When ensuring responsiveness in a CI/CD pipeline.

commands.command: Use examples in prompts to guide the model.
commands.description: Provides examples to improve model's understanding and output quality.
commands.scenario: When teaching the model a new coding style or pattern.

commands.description: Retries the request up to 3 times on failure.
commands.scenario: When dealing with intermittent network issues.

commands.command: Use comments to clarify code logic.
commands.description: Instructs the model to add comments for better code readability.
Sets the logging level to debug for detailed output.
commands.scenario: When diagnosing issues with API requests.

commands.command: Use specific programming language tags in prompts.
commands.description: Guides the model to generate code in a specific language.
commands.scenario: When needing code in Python instead of JavaScript.

commands.description: Sets the API key for authentication.
commands.scenario: When making authenticated requests to the v0.dev API.

commands.command: Use constraints to limit output scope.
commands.description: Constrains the model's output to specific requirements.
commands.scenario: When generating code that must adhere to strict guidelines.

commands.description: Specifies the server region for processing requests.
commands.scenario: When optimizing for latency by choosing a closer server.

commands.command: System Role Definition: 'You are a Senior Staff Engineer specializing in [Framework]'
commands.description: Assign a specific seniority level and domain expertise to the system prompt to improve architectural decision-making and code quality.
Explicitly pass the target component library flag to ensure the generated UI code uses the correct primitive patterns and styling utility classes.

commands.command: Iterative Refinement Pattern: 'Identify potential edge cases in the current code and suggest fixes.'
commands.description: A prompt-engineering technique to trigger self-correction and error-handling logic in generated components.
Force the model to return a specific file extension to prevent mixed-syntax outputs when working in multi-language environments.

commands.command: Modularization Prompt: 'Break this component into smaller, reusable sub-components.'
commands.description: A technique to prevent 'mega-component' syndrome and ensure the generated code adheres to the Single Responsibility Principle.
